title: Andheri Pawn Shop Robbery
description: Two suspects entered a pawn shop in Andheri West at 9:40 PM. One held staff at gunpoint while the second cleared display cases. Getaway vehicle was a black hatchback parked in the service lane. Partial face captured on CCTV.
modus_operandi: Two-person team, closing-time targeting, armed distraction plus collector, gloves worn, service lane entry and exit.

suspects.description: Male, 5'9", medium build, dark complexion, partial face on CCTV

evidence.description: Partial face at entry point camera
Glove fragment behind display case, DNA matched suspect
Black Maruti Swift, partial plate MH-02

blind_spots: Mobile tower data not pulled until day 8
Service lane exit not mapped until day 4
No cross-district MO matching done initially
resolution: DNA from glove matched 2017 Pune case. Both suspects arrested day 14.
